calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Dismissing Respondent'S Demand For Arbitration For Failure To Obey This Court'S Prior Discovery Order;
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION's Motion for Order Dismissing Respondent's Demand for Arbitration for Failure to Obey this Court's Prior Discovery Order is granted. Respondent's failure to comply with a court order compelling discovery, served on April 14, 2010, justifies dismissal of Respondent's action. No opposition to this motion has been filed as of July 15, 2010. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: DONALD J. SULLIVAN, not reported.

Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Demand For Inspection is granted. Respondent is ordered to respond to Petitioner's Form Interrogatories and Demand For Inspection Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
